description: Q&A training examples for Aniket's portfolio chatbot. Add new entries here to improve responses.

examples.a: Yes! Aniket Rai is a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years at SysCloud Technologies. He builds config-driven frameworks, AI agents, and natural language interfaces for cloud data.
Aniket Rai is a Senior Software Engineer based in Hyderabad. 5+ years at SysCloud building scalable backend systems with Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and AWS.

Aniket Rai is a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years at SysCloud Technologies. He's built config-driven frameworks handling 12+ cloud integrations, AI agents that auto-resolve production issues, and an AI-powered natural language interface for customer data.
Aniket builds scalable backend systems, AI agents, and config-driven frameworks at SysCloud Technologies. His work spans Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS, and LLM integration.

Aniket has 5+ years of production engineering experience. He's built systems handling 12+ cloud integrations, reduced query times from 10s+ to under 2s, achieved 4x batch job speedups, and eliminated 100% of critical security violations in the codebase.
Aniket's core stack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS (S3, Lambda, Fargate, Batch, SQS), GraphQL, Docker, Grafana, ELK Stack, and AI/LLM integration with Claude and MCP.

Key projects: Sky 2.0 (AI NL interface), DAL AI-Agents (4 operational monitoring agents), MDL 2.0 (config-driven framework), Anomaly Detection (Prophet ML), Restore & Export (millions of items/sec), Customer Dashboard (13+ widgets), MDLOPS Microservice.

5+ years at SysCloud: SSE (Jun 2023-Present) building AI agents, Sky 2.0, MDL 2.0; SE (May 2021-Jun 2023) building Restore/Export, S3 integrity pipeline, ELK Stack; Intern (Nov 2020-Apr 2021) GraphQL queries and microservices POCs.
Email: rai078945@gmail.com | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aniket-kumar-rai | Hyderabad, India. Open to Senior Backend and Full-Stack roles. Responds within 24 hours.

Sky 2.0 is SysCloud's AI-powered natural language interface. Customers ask questions, the AI builds queries, redirects to the right page with filters, and initiates Restore & Export actions automatically.

examples.q: tell me about dal ai agents
examples.a: 4 DAL AI-Agents: Database Health, Restore/Export, StartBackup, and PostGraphile Slow-Queries. Each detects and resolves issues automatically before they impact customers.
MDL 2.0 replaced complex mutation logic with JSON-driven config. 12+ cloud integrations migrated. Adding a new cloud now requires zero code changes — only config.
Aniket's notice period is 45 days (negotiable). For specific timeline discussions, contact him at rai078945@gmail.com or +91 7668514258.
Hyderabad, Telangana, India (IST, UTC+5:30). Open to hybrid and remote roles.

examples.q: what university did aniket go to
examples.a: Lovely Professional University — B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, 2017-2021.

Yes, Aniket has 1 year of PHP experience at SysCloud. He used PHP in two projects: (1) Slack eDiscovery — configured PHP backend services for Slack data ingestion and event handling; (2) Bulk Export — extended the PHP export backend to support multi-user exports under a single URL.

examples.q: what php experience does aniket have
examples.a: Aniket used PHP at SysCloud Technologies in two projects: Slack eDiscovery Search (PHP backend services for data ingestion and event handling) and Bulk Export (extended PHP export backend from single user to multi-user exports). 1 year of hands-on PHP experience.

PHP was used in two SysCloud projects: (1) Slack eDiscovery Search — configured PHP backend services for Slack data ingestion and event handling as part of a full-stack integration. (2) Bulk Export — extended the PHP export backend to handle multi-user exports in a single request with a unified download URL.

Aniket's PHP work at SysCloud: Slack eDiscovery (PHP backend for Slack data ingestion) and Bulk Export (PHP export backend extended for multi-user support). Full-stack delivery across UI (React), backend (PHP + Node.js), and database (PostgreSQL).

Yes. Aniket has hands-on PHP experience from production work at SysCloud — configured PHP backend services for Slack eDiscovery integration and extended the PHP export backend to deliver Bulk Export with multi-user support.

Bulk Export is a feature Aniket built at SysCloud by extending the PHP export backend. The previous implementation handled only single user-level export. Aniket refactored it to support multi-user exports under a single URL, processing multiple users in one request with unified download link generation.

Slack eDiscovery Search is a full-stack integration Aniket built at SysCloud. Customers can search and retrieve Slack files, messages, and chats directly through the platform. He configured PHP backend services for data ingestion, built Node.js APIs, wrote GraphQL mutations, and delivered the frontend search interface.

Aniket started as an intern at SysCloud in Nov 2020, was promoted to SE in May 2021, then to Senior SE in Jun 2023. He's spent 5+ years on the same B2B SaaS product — cloud data backup — which means deep domain expertise. Key highlights: Sky 2.0 (AI NL interface), MDL 2.0 (12+ cloud integrations, zero-code config), 4 DAL AI-Agents, 4x batch job speedup, and eliminating all critical security violations. Core stack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS.

examples.q: why are you looking for a change
examples.a: Aniket has spent 5+ years at SysCloud, built multiple systems from scratch, and grown from intern to Senior Engineer. He's now looking for a role where he can apply that architectural experience to a new product or domain — particularly in AI-heavy, backend-intensive, or platform engineering contexts.

examples.q: why did you stay at one company so long
examples.a: Aniket joined SysCloud as an intern and kept getting promoted because the problems kept getting harder. Intern to SE to SSE in the same product means he owns the full stack — he designed Sky 2.0, MDL 2.0, MDLOPS, and 4 production AI agents from scratch. Depth of ownership like that doesn't happen if you switch every two years.

Top achievements: (1) Sky 2.0 — took an AI-powered natural language interface from idea to production; (2) MDL 2.0 — made 12+ cloud integrations maintainable by config alone, zero code per cloud; (3) 4x batch job speedup in production; (4) Query time from 10s+ to under 2s for enterprise archives; (5) 0 critical security violations after SonarQube overhaul.

examples.q: tell me about a challenging problem you solved
examples.a: The batch job parallelization was a core infrastructure challenge — jobs were running sequentially, causing delays in customer-facing dashboard freshness. Aniket redesigned the framework with parallel host-level execution and CPU-level optimizations, achieving 4x faster execution. Another: diagnosing S3 object versioning mismatches causing restore failures, then building an automated version-copy mechanism to fix them without human intervention.

Aniket's strengths: (1) Systems thinking — he designs architecture, not just features; (2) End-to-end ownership — from schema design to frontend delivery; (3) AI integration — built production LLM systems before it was mainstream; (4) Measurable impact — every optimization has a number behind it (4x, 5x, 0 violations, 12+ integrations).

Aniket's natural tendency is to go deep on a problem before moving on — which sometimes means he spends more time than needed getting the foundation right. He's learned to balance that with shipping cadence in fast-moving environments.

examples.q: where do you see yourself in 5 years
examples.a: Aniket wants to be in an architect or tech lead role — designing the systems, mentoring engineers, and working at the intersection of AI and backend infrastructure. He's already doing parts of that at SysCloud; he wants the full scope.

Aniket ships systems that scale. He's designed AI agents, config-driven frameworks handling 12+ cloud integrations, and a natural language interface for enterprise customers — all in production. Every claim comes with a metric: 4x faster, 10s to 2s, 0 critical bugs, 12+ clouds. 5 years at one product means deep expertise, not job-hopping.

examples.q: tell me about a time you led a project
examples.a: MDL 2.0 is the clearest example. Aniket identified that adding a new cloud integration required weeks of code changes across multiple layers. He designed a JSON-driven config framework, migrated 12+ existing cloud integrations, and delivered a system where new clouds require zero code changes. He owned the design, migration, and delivery end-to-end.

examples.q: how do you handle pressure or deadlines
examples.a: Aniket's pattern is to scope early and communicate blockers before they become problems. At SysCloud, production issues require immediate response — the DAL AI-Agents were built specifically to auto-resolve issues before they escalate, which is his philosophy: build systems that reduce pressure, not just handle it.

Aniket works with deep ownership — he prefers to understand the full system before touching it. He designs for scale (config-driven, not code-per-feature), builds with observability in mind (Grafana, ELK Stack, trace IDs), and measures every improvement.

examples.q: do you prefer working alone or in a team
examples.a: Both — he designs architecture independently and drives it through collaboration. Sky 2.0, MDL 2.0, and MDLOPS were all Aniket's designs that got built with cross-team coordination across product, DB, and ops teams.

examples.q: how do you keep up with technology
examples.a: Aniket stays current by building with new technology rather than just reading about it. Sky 2.0 and the DAL AI-Agents were built using MCP and Claude before most teams had LLMs on their roadmap. He learns by shipping.

As Senior SE, Aniket has guided junior engineers through code reviews, architectural decisions, and onboarding. He's also the de facto owner for MDL 2.0 and MDLOPS, which means other engineers follow his patterns and standards.
Compensation details are best discussed directly. Reach out to Aniket at rai078945@gmail.com or +91 7668514258.
Aniket prefers to discuss compensation directly based on the role and scope. Contact him at rai078945@gmail.com or +91 7668514258.

Yes, Aniket has Python experience — primarily for scripting, automation, and ML tooling. He used the Facebook Prophet library (Python) for the Anomaly Detection engine at SysCloud, combining it with a rule-based JSON comparison system for statistical deviation detection in backup data.

examples.q: what python experience does aniket have
examples.a: Aniket used Python for the Anomaly Detection system at SysCloud — specifically the Facebook Prophet ML library for time-series anomaly detection. He also uses Python for scripting and automation tooling. His primary production language is Node.js/TypeScript.

examples.q: what is anomaly detection at syscloud
examples.a: Aniket built a dual-mode Anomaly Detection engine: (1) Rule-based — JSON comparison against defined thresholds for known failure patterns; (2) ML-based — Facebook Prophet for statistical time-series deviation detection. It's integrated into the MDLOPS microservice and flags backup anomalies before they surface to customers.

Yes. Aniket delivers full-stack features — his React experience includes the Slack eDiscovery search interface, customer-facing Dashboard widgets, Partner Portal UI, and Gen3/Gen4/Gen5 cloud pages. His primary strength is backend/Node.js, but he ships frontend when needed.

Yes — AWS is core to Aniket's stack. He uses S3 (backup storage, integrity pipelines), Lambda (event-driven jobs), Fargate (containerized workloads), Batch (100K+ backup jobs), SQS (async messaging for Add-On Actions), Athena (on-demand metadata queries), CodePipeline, and CodeBuild for CI/CD.

PostGraphile auto-generates a GraphQL API from a PostgreSQL schema. Aniket has used it since his internship — all GraphQL mutations at SysCloud run through PostGraphile. MDL 2.0 executes each action as a micro-task inside PostGraphile, and one of his 4 DAL AI-Agents specifically monitors PostGraphile for slow queries.

MDLOPS is a TypeScript microservice Aniket built from scratch using cm-runner-plus with JSON-driven config. It handles 5 async add-on modules (eDiscovery, BDI, etc.) with parallel execution via PM2, integrates the Facebook Prophet anomaly detection algorithm, and ties into the Add-On Actions system.

Add-On Actions is the system Aniket designed at SysCloud for async operations on backup data: Dismiss, Hold/Release, Archive On-Demand, Remove Sharing, Transfer Ownership, and Deletion. He modeled the parent/child schema and full mutation layer, with async processing via AWS SQS and real-time UI status tracking across 8 states.

The Customer Dashboard is a 13+ widget UI Aniket built at SysCloud showing aggregated backup metrics across 12+ cloud providers. It uses pre-computed PostgreSQL Materialized Views with concurrent refresh (zero transactional impact), a config-driven query layer, and lazy rendering. All data is dynamically driven from a metadata table.

The Partner Portal is the MSP (Managed Service Provider) portal Aniket built at SysCloud. It supports 4-layer hierarchical account aggregation: Reseller > Distributor > MSP > Customer, with role-based access control and aggregated usage analytics across the hierarchy.

Restore & Export is one of SysCloud's core features — Aniket built the action layer for S3 Data Migration. He used AWS Athena for on-demand metadata hydration of old backup data, reducing Archives query time from 10s+ to under 2s for large datasets. The Gen3 version he architected uses a unified config-driven function with zero code changes per new cloud.

examples.q: what is the batch job framework
examples.a: Aniket overhauled SysCloud's Batch Job and Materialized View refresh framework. He introduced parallel host-level execution, intelligent scheduling (login-triggered and time-triggered), and CPU-level optimizations. Result: 4x faster job execution in production. The framework handles 100K+ backup jobs across 5 database types.

Sky 2.0 is SysCloud's AI-powered interface built on Claude LLM with MCP integration. A customer types a natural language question (e.g., 'show me failed backups for Google Drive last week'), Sky 2.0 interprets the intent, builds the appropriate query, redirects to the relevant page with filters pre-applied, and can initiate Restore or Export actions automatically.

MCP (Model Context Protocol) is Anthropic's open protocol for connecting AI models to external tools and data. Aniket uses it in Sky 2.0 to connect the Claude LLM to SysCloud's internal APIs and database — enabling the AI to query live data, navigate pages, and trigger real actions. He integrated MCP before it became mainstream.

examples.q: what is the s3 integrity pipeline
examples.a: A weekly automated pipeline Aniket engineered to verify S3 backup data integrity. It detects missing zip files and count mismatches across S3 buckets, then automatically triggers re-backup when discrepancies are found. Stack: Node.js, AWS Fargate, Lambda, and Athena. Full Grafana monitoring for observability and alerting.

Aniket led a code quality initiative at SysCloud resolving accumulated SonarQube issues across the codebase. Result: all critical security violations eliminated (down to 0), total code issues cut by 90%. This included fixing injection vulnerabilities, unsafe patterns, and deprecated API usage.

Measurable performance wins: (1) 4x faster batch job execution via parallel host-level execution; (2) 10s+ to under 2s archive query time via AWS Athena on-demand hydration; (3) CPU-level optimizations in the Timeseries framework; (4) PostGraphile Slow-Queries AI-Agent auto-detects and resolves slow queries before customer impact.

examples.q: how does aniket handle production issues
examples.a: Aniket built the DAL AI-Agents specifically to handle production issues automatically before they escalate. 4 agents cover Database Health, Restore/Export failures, StartBackup issues, and PostGraphile Slow-Queries. His philosophy: build the system to resolve itself rather than waiting for an on-call alert.

examples.q: is aniket available for full time
examples.a: Yes. Aniket is actively looking for full-time Senior Backend, Full-Stack, or AI Engineer roles. Notice period: 45 days (negotiable). Contact: rai078945@gmail.com | +91 7668514258.

examples.q: what roles is aniket open to
examples.a: Aniket is open to: Senior Software Engineer, Senior Backend Engineer, Node.js Developer, AI Engineer, Full-Stack Engineer, Platform Engineer. Preferred locations: Remote, Hybrid, or Hyderabad. Contact: rai078945@gmail.com.
B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering from Lovely Professional University (LPU), 2017-2021. He interned at SysCloud during his final year and was converted to full-time.
